creator: kristinacors
caption: Save this for the next 70-degree day in NYC… these 10 outdoor spots are unreal #travelbucketlist #nycitinerary #nychiddengems #travelcontentcreator #shotoniphone

transcription.text: 10 outdoor New York City gems you need to experience this spring. You know that first warm day in New York City when everyone's outside? Well, these are all the spots you need to check out when New York City is in full bloom. There's nothing that matches that feeling when the temperature hits 70 degrees in New York City. The breeze is perfect, the sunlight is filtering through the trees, and it feels like the whole city just came back to life overnight. This is exactly the kind of vibe I'm always chasing in this city. So if you like this vibe and aesthetic, you'll love my seven-day New York City itinerary. Because unlike other itineraries, it's not just a list of beautiful places, it's literally organized by neighborhood with four hidden gems planned out for each day. And I mapped out the exact walking and driving times between every stop, so you always know exactly how long it takes to get from place to place. If you want it, just click the link in my profile and then click New York City itinerary. Be honest, which outdoor spot are you adding to your list first? Save this video for the next 70-degree day in New York City, and follow for more gems in New York City and around the world.
